summary: UI/UX Redesign Testing Complete - All 10 features tested and working. Swiss Technical/Academic Brutalism aesthetic successfully implemented with dark navy sidebar, split-layout login, and responsive design.

issues: Dashboard shows 'Loading...' state persistently - may need longer wait or data loading issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX redesign verified. All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes. Login flow, MFA screens, dashboard navigation, profile dropdown, and mobile responsive behavior all working correctly.

login_page_split_layout.details: Dark navy left panel with Quadley branding, feature pills (Community, Events, Recognition, Secure), and tagline. White right panel with auth forms.

login_form_functionality.details: Email/password submission works, redirects to MFA setup (for admin) or dashboard

register_tab.details: Shows registration form with all fields: First Name, Last Name, Email, Password with requirements indicator, Confirm Password, Role selector, Floor, Year, Student ID, Terms checkbox

mfa_setup_screen.details: Clean, professional styling with Shield icon, feature list (Protects against unauthorized access, Works with authenticator apps, Backup codes for recovery), Set Up 2FA button, Maybe Later skip option

mfa_skip_functionality.details: Clicking 'Maybe Later' skips MFA setup and redirects to dashboard with toast notification 'You can set up 2FA later in Settings'

dashboard_dark_sidebar.details: 280px fixed dark navy (#0f172a/slate-900) sidebar with Quadley logo, navigation items, and user info at bottom

sidebar_navigation.details: All nav items clickable and navigate correctly: Home, Messages, Events, Announcements, Dining, Floor, Co-Curricular, Birthdays, Academics, Recognition, Jobs, Services, Wellbeing, Incident Reporting, AI Assistance

profile_dropdown.details: Opens from top-right user avatar showing: user name/email, Profile, Settings, Super Admin (for super_admin role), Log Out

logout_functionality.details: Clicking Log Out in profile dropdown redirects to login page

mobile_responsive.details: Sidebar collapses on mobile (390px viewport), hamburger menu appears, mobile menu overlay shows dark navy sidebar with all navigation items

design_verification.color_palette: Oxford Navy (#0F172A/slate-900) used for sidebar and primary actions, Amber accent (#B45309) visible in feature pills
design_verification.typography: Manrope for headings (font-heading), Public Sans for body text, JetBrains Mono for code elements
design_verification.layout: Split-screen login (50/50 on desktop), 280px fixed sidebar on dashboard
design_verification.contrast: High contrast achieved - white text on dark navy sidebar, dark text on light backgrounds
